TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Fudafudak = Gaga mniq Taytung Peynansyang ka alang Fudafudak. 67 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 152 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 7% niqan 10 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 93% niqan 142 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 3%, Paiwan 1%, Puyuma 2%. Pusu nniqan alang Tgkingal plealay mnuda Feng-neyeyn-ci ka alang nii. Nniqan alang Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Pey-nan alang Fu-san. Gasuc Gaga siyaw Tay 11 syeyn 157km. Ti-ri lnglingay Siyaw gsilung. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Mgrig rulu: Tay-pey>Kwo-taw 3 haw>Nan-cow cyaw-riyo-taw>Seng-ri ru>Ta-tung ru>Ping-er kung-ru>Tay 1>Cyo-cwang ru>Nan-hwey kung-ru>Ta-he ru>C-pen ru>Hwa-tng hay-an kung-ru>C-rin ru>Sung-cyang ru>dhuq. Pusu klgan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Pnyahan alang Nsgan Pey-nan o wana bi alang Fu-san ka gaga siyaw gsilung Tay-ping-yang. Kika seejiq alang o tmhangan dha Fulafulangan, dungus kari na o Fudafudak. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pusu pnhyugan: ◎Ciway sapah pyasan Fu-san Qnawal: 089-281086 Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Pey-nan alang Fu-san Yu-cang 3 rin 66 haw. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = *uda*udak = gaga mniq tajtuŋ pənansjaŋ ka alaŋ *uda*udak. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis *%, paiwan *%, pujuma *%. pusu nniqan alaŋ tgkiŋal pləalaj mnuda *əŋ-nəən-ʦi ka alaŋ nii. nniqan alaŋ njusan taj-tuŋ nsgan pə-nan alaŋ *u-san. gasuʦ gaga sijaw taj ** sjən ***km. ti-ɾi lŋliŋaj sijaw gsiluŋ. pgkla patas ʦjaw-tuŋ mgɾig ɾulu: taj-pə>kwo-taw * ħaw>nan-ʦow ʦjaw-ɾijo-taw>səŋ-ɾi ɾu>ta-tuŋ ɾu>piŋ-əɾ kuŋ-ɾu>taj *>ʦjo-ʦwaŋ ɾu>nan-ħwə kuŋ-ɾu>ta-ħə ɾu>ʦ-pən ɾu>ħwa-tŋ ħaj-an kuŋ-ɾu>ʦ-ɾin ɾu>suŋ-ʦjaŋ ɾu>dħuq. pusu klgan səəɟiq nəalaŋ amis. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi amis ni tlu. pnjaħan alaŋ nsgan pə-nan o wana bi alaŋ *u-san ka gaga sijaw gsiluŋ taj-piŋ-jaŋ. kika səəɟiq alaŋ o tmħaŋan dħa *ula*ulaŋan, duŋus kaɾi na o *uda*udak. pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw pusu pnħjugan: *ʦiwaj sapaħ pjasan *u-san qnawal: ***-****** njusan taj-tuŋ nsgan pə-nan alaŋ *u-san ju-ʦaŋ * ɾin ** ħaw. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Fudafudak = Gaga mniq Taytung Peynansyang ka alang Fudafudak. 67 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 152 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 7% niqan 10 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 93% niqan 142 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 3%, Paiwan 1%, Puyuma 2%. Pusu nniqan alang Tgkingal plealay mnuda Feng-neyeyn-ci ka alang nii. Nniqan alang Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Pey-nan alang Fu-san. Gasuc Gaga siyaw Tay 11 syeyn 157km. Ti-ri lnglingay Siyaw gsilung. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Mgrig rulu: Tay-pey>Kwo-taw 3 haw>Nan-cow cyaw-riyo-taw>Seng-ri ru>Ta-tung ru>Ping-er kung-ru>Tay 1>Cyo-cwang ru>Nan-hwey kung-ru>Ta-he ru>C-pen ru>Hwa-tng hay-an kung-ru>C-rin ru>Sung-cyang ru>dhuq. Pusu klgan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Pnyahan alang Nsgan Pey-nan o wana bi alang Fu-san ka gaga siyaw gsilung Tay-ping-yang. Kika seejiq alang o tmhangan dha Fulafulangan, dungus kari na o Fudafudak. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pusu pnhyugan: ◎Ciway sapah pyasan Fu-san Qnawal: 089-281086 Nyusan Tay-tung nsgan Pey-nan alang Fu-san Yu-cang 3 rin 66 haw. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = *uda*udak = gaga mniq tajtuŋ pənansjaŋ ka alaŋ *uda*udak. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis *%, paiwan *%, pujuma *%. pusu nniqan alaŋ tgkiŋal pləalaj mnuda *əŋ-nəən-ʦi ka alaŋ nii. nniqan alaŋ njusan taj-tuŋ nsgan pə-nan alaŋ *u-san. gasuʦ gaga sijaw taj ** sjən ***km. ti-ɾi lŋliŋaj sijaw gsiluŋ. pgkla patas ʦjaw-tuŋ mgɾig ɾulu: taj-pə>kwo-taw * ħaw>nan-ʦow ʦjaw-ɾijo-taw>səŋ-ɾi ɾu>ta-tuŋ ɾu>piŋ-əɾ kuŋ-ɾu>taj *>ʦjo-ʦwaŋ ɾu>nan-ħwə kuŋ-ɾu>ta-ħə ɾu>ʦ-pən ɾu>ħwa-tŋ ħaj-an kuŋ-ɾu>ʦ-ɾin ɾu>suŋ-ʦjaŋ ɾu>dħuq. pusu klgan səəɟiq nəalaŋ amis. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi amis ni tlu. pnjaħan alaŋ nsgan pə-nan o wana bi alaŋ *u-san ka gaga sijaw gsiluŋ taj-piŋ-jaŋ. kika səəɟiq alaŋ o tmħaŋan dħa *ula*ulaŋan, duŋus kaɾi na o *uda*udak. pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw pusu pnħjugan: *ʦiwaj sapaħ pjasan *u-san qnawal: ***-****** njusan taj-tuŋ nsgan pə-nan alaŋ *u-san ju-ʦaŋ * ɾin ** ħaw. pnjaħan pnatas
